content.text: Now let me read the full SnsService.java to understand the message delivery logic.

Now I have a clear picture of the bug. The `deliverMessage` method at line 561 always calls `buildSnsEnvelope` (line 572) and wraps messages in the SNS JSON envelope, regardless of the `RawMessageDelivery` attribute being set on the subscription. The fix should check if `RawMessageDelivery` is `"true"` for the subscription and, if so, pass the raw message directly to SQS.

Let me also look at the test file to understand existing test patterns:

content.text:
The test is confirming the bug — only 1 test failure, and it's my `rawMessageDelivery_deliversRawMessageToSqs` test. The response body contains:

```json
{"Type":"Notification","MessageId":"...","TopicArn":"...","Message":"{\"orderId\":\"456\"}"}
```

This confirms the bug: despite `RawMessageDelivery` being set to `true`, the message is still wrapped in the SNS envelope. 

Now let me implement the fix. I need to modify the `deliverMessage` method in `SnsService.java` to check if `RawMessageDelivery` is `"true"` on the subscription and pass the raw message directly to SQS instead of the envelope

content.text:
The fix is complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

## Bug Analysis

The `deliverMessage` method in `SnsService.java` (the SNS→SQS delivery path) always wrapped messages in the standard SNS JSON envelope (containing `Type`, `MessageId`, `TopicArn`, `Message`, `MessageAttributes`, etc.) regardless of the `RawMessageDelivery` subscription attribute. In real AWS, when `RawMessageDelivery` is set to `true` on an SQS subscription, SNS delivers the raw message body directly without the envelope.

## Fix

In `src/main/java/io/github/hectorvent/floci/services/sns/SnsService.java`, the SQS delivery case now checks if the subscription has `RawMessageDelivery` set to `"true"`:

- If `RawMessageDelivery` is `"true"`: the raw `message` string is sent directly to SQS
- Otherwise: the existing behavior is preserved — the message is wrapped in the SNS JSON envelope via `buildSnsEnvelope()`

The change is minimal (lines 572-578 in the `deliverMessage` method's `"sqs"` case) and all 29 existing SNS integration tests continue to pass.
